calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-03-2021 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-02-2021 Continued To Mar-03-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jay Greene appeared by zoom for and with Michael Hung (Administrator) by zoom.

Mr. Greene stated that all notices for creditors and the State went out, that the value of the estate is $182,047.66, that the statutory fees for the Administrator and the Attorney are $6,461.43, that the heirs to the estate at the time of the Decedent's death of February 23, 2016 were the Decedent's Mother (Julie) and the Father (Kwai), and that the Father was terminally ill. Mr. Greene also stated that the Father completed the disclaimer, that it was signed and delivered on April 5, 2016, that there was some confusion as to whether the Attorney for the Father was filing the disclaimer, and that Father's Attorney filed the disclaimer on December 13, 2018. In addition, Mr. Greene stated that the Father's Attorney also filed an affidavit in support of the disclaimer on November 10, 2020 which addresses the issue of whether the disclaimer is timely. The Court accepts the disclaimer and waives the timing issue. The Court noted that if there wasn't a disclaimer, the Gentleman's children would have been his successors, and stated that it is concerned if notice was given to Cindy and Mon. Mr. Greene stated that when he filed the petition the Mother was the only heir and that he was not anticipating that the children would be heirs of the estate. The Amended Petition for Allowance of Statutory Fees to Personal Representative and Attorney, etc. is continued to March 3, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for notice to be provided to Cindy and Mon.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Dec-03-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jay Greene for Michael Hung.

The Court stated that it does not have a proof of service showing that a copy of the petition was sent to those parties who requested special notice. Mr. Jay stated that he does not have it, that one tax return was filed last week, that the Accountant met with the Franchise Tax Board to go over the LLC and that now that this is cleared up, he should be in a position to file for final distribution. The Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration is under submission. Mr. Jay is to file a corrected proof of service by next week. If the corrected proof of service is not received within seven days, this petition will go off calendar and the Court will set a new status date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Administration Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-04-2019 Continued To Mar-04-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jay Greene for Michael Hung.

Mr. Greene stated that he filed his petition. The Court Clerk noted that a pleading was submitted for e-filing on February 3rd, that it is still pending and no hearing date has been assigned. Status on close of estate is continued to March 4, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Dec-19-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jay Greene for and with Michael Hung (Administrator).

Mr. Greene stated that he thinks they are getting to a point where they can be ready to file for final distribution, that the litigated matters have come to conclusion, that they have an insolvent business, and that they will be filing a notice of proposed action to close the business and give notice to the creditors. The Court informed Counsel that it only needs an order. Mr. Greene stated that he will submit an order today. The Court granted the Report on Status of Administration (subject to receipt and review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-20-2018 Continued To Jul-18-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jay Greene for Administrator.

The Court noted that the inventory and the petition to close the estate have not been filed. Mr. Greene stated that he spoke with the Probate Examiner, that he got confused as to what needed to be done and that there have been complications with the business interest. Mr. Greene also stated that there was a large law suit against the Estate and the Parents of the Decedent, that the Tax Accountant never finished the tax returns and that they are back on track to getting the tax returns done. Status on close of estate is continued to July 18, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Greene is to file the inventory and appraisal, and either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report of status of administration by July 12, 2018.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
